Fixed missing events by increasing the hook log tail to 20MB, and added Enter to open a full-screen detail overlay for the selected line.

Confirmed the issue and proposed a per-session directory layout under `~/.tenex/edge/sessions/<session-id>/`, outlining write-side, read-side, cleanup, and backward-compatibility considerations.

Implemented per-session logging: writers now target session-specific directories with fallback to `_unscoped/`, and the reader enumerates session directories in full without tail truncation while still checking legacy files for backward compatibility.
Deleted both legacy monolithic log files; new events now go to per-session directories.
